ai.paired_uplift_not_run_reason: No deterministic candidate passed every mandatory gate.

risk_reviewer.permitted_role: Asynchronous schema-constrained veto after deterministic model, data, ownership, execution, and risk gates pass.

rejected_models.fin-r1:8b: Understated post-reconnect uncertainty and failed the required risk-score range.
rejected_models.fino1:8b: Failed the liquidation case because leverage was omitted from the rationale.

risk_reviewer.uplift_test: Run only if a deterministic candidate passes. Compare paired chronological baseline and AI-veto daily net returns under identical costs; require positive exact sign-test and moving-block-bootstrap lower bounds, no worse drawdown or profit factor, and complete artifact hashes.
